title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Blue Dart - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Blue Dart - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Blue Dart. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Distribution Manager to strengthen our Faridabad-based team.

About Blue Dart:
Blue Dart is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Blue Dart!
